name: B.E.S. Crystal Core
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> クリスタル・コア
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned, put 3 counters on it. This card cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card attacks or is attacked, remove 1 counter from this card at the end of the Damage Step. If you cannot, destroy it. Once per turn, during your Main Phase, you can change 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls to face-up Defense Position.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned, put 3 counters on it. This card cannot be destroyed by battle. jp_sets.set: Duel Royale Deck Set EX Round 2

eff_types: Trigger, Continuous, Trigger, Ignition <!-- The removing counter or if you can't, destroy it is part of the same Trigger -->
